summary: Merged implementation-only decomp/matching cleanup across small UI, item, map, player trick, camera, effect, and VI support files. The PR body says review cleanup removed raw MWERKS asm fallbacks and pragma additions from ifstatus, kept archive section names inline, removed dead/address-style data anchors, marked the remaining soundtest pragma as TODO debt, and restored readable vi1201v1 spawn data naming. Loaded evidence reports clean diff check, ninja, and regression-check results with 14 new exact matches and no match/regression losses.

key_files.role: large camera matching cleanup; diff excerpt shows variable naming, expression reshaping, pointer temporaries, PAD_STACK/local lifetime changes, and some goto-shaped control flow for matching
evidence_refs: raw_diff:camera.c excerpt around Camera_8002BD88, Camera_8002C010, Camera_8002C1A8, Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002C908, Camera_8002F4D4, Camera_80031328

what_changed: Touched 24 implementation files under cm, ef, if, it, mp, pl, and vi; no header/naming churn is claimed by the PR body.
Improved or exactly matched scattered small-system functions; loaded report lists 14 new exact matches, +4860 matched code bytes, +192 matched data bytes, and 66 unmatched improvements.

Camera diff excerpt shows matching-oriented cleanup: replacing temp names with role names such as eye_dist, scale, movement_scale, substick_x/substick_y, slot, cam_pos, cam_offset, eye_offset_y/z; reshaping arithmetic expressions; and adjusting local declaration order/lifetimes.
Review cleanup in ifstatus removed raw MWERKS inline asm fallbacks for ifStatus_802F7134 and ifStatus_802F7220 and restored C implementations.
Review cleanup in ifstatus kept archive section names inline at lbArchive_LoadSections call sites instead of using address-style string/data references.
soundtest retained a tightly scoped #pragma global_optimizer off only as accepted temporary debt, with the comment changed to TODO wording.
vi1201v1 restored a readable player_spawn data shape rather than an address-named wrapper.
ifprize.c is explicitly documented as not part of the final branch delta because keeping an older split hunk regressed current master’s match report.
smart_moves: The author grouped scattered small-system improvements but documented medium review risk and hotspots so reviewers could focus on implementation groups rather than a single subsystem.
Review concerns were resolved by deleting risky ifstatus pragmas/raw asm and reverting archive literal/data-anchor churn rather than preserving match-only artifacts.
Remaining soundtest pragma was left narrowly scoped and labeled as cleanup debt instead of presenting it as normal source style.
The PR body recorded base/head hashes and verification commands, making the matching/regression claim auditable within the PR evidence.
The final branch avoided including ifprize.c after rebase because the PR body says that older split hunk regressed current master’s match report.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matching attempt introduces raw MWERKS asm fallbacks for ordinary functions, review may require reverting to C implementations rather than accepting raw asm as a shortcut.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md:discussion_r3445369087 Revert raw asm for ifStatus_802F7134
review_comments.md:discussion_r3445369517 Revert raw asm for ifStatus_802F7220
human_pr_text.md:removed raw MWERKS asm fallbacks; both functions are back to C implementations

decomp_lessons.lesson: Archive/resource string literals should remain inline when there is no data ownership evidence; replacing a literal with an address-style data reference was questioned and later removed.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md:discussion_r3429992893 why did we remove this inline?
human_pr_text.md:kept archive section names inline at lbArchive_LoadSections call sites

decomp_lessons.lesson: Address-style wrappers or dead data anchors used for data order/matching should be removed when a readable local data shape is supported.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md:restored readable player_spawn data shape instead of address-named wrapper

decomp_lessons.lesson: Pragmas can be temporarily tolerated only when tightly scoped and explicitly marked as cleanup debt; they should not be normalized as source style.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md:discussion_r3445371297 This is fine for now, just update the comment; TODO suggestion

naming_conventions.convention: Prefer readable role/data names over address-style wrappers when the PR evidence supports the role, e.g. restoring vi1201v1 player_spawn data shape.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md:restores readable vi1201v1 spawn data name/player_spawn data shape

naming_conventions.convention: Clean temp-like locals into local role names when the role is clear, as shown in camera changes from temp_f1/temp_f1_2/var_f30 to scale/movement_scale/eye_dist.
Keep archive/resource section names as inline string literals at call sites unless data ownership evidence justifies a named symbol.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Raw MWERKS asm fallbacks were attempted for ifStatus_802F7134 and ifStatus_802F7220 but rejected in review and removed; do not treat this as an accepted tactic for ordinary implementation functions.
A tightly scoped #pragma global_optimizer off in soundtest was accepted only temporarily, with explicit TODO cleanup wording.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md:soundtest pragma note updated to TODO

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Camera matching used declaration order/local lifetime and expression-shape changes, including local pointer temporaries and arithmetic regrouping, to improve matches; evidence does not prove these are global style rules.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:camera.c excerpt shows local pointer temporaries, expression regrouping, PAD_STACK/local changes
text_corpus.jsonl:report lists Camera_8002C010 and Camera_8002F4D4 new exact matches plus other camera improvements

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Avoid carrying older split hunks after rebase when they regress current master, as documented for ifprize.c.

notes: Evidence is strong for PR identity, changed files, review feedback, and final cleanup outcomes because the PR body and issue comment explicitly document them.
The raw diff is truncated, so file-specific summaries beyond the shown camera excerpt and review-comment hunks rely on changed-file metadata and report summaries, not full diff inspection.
Verification results are PR-reported and bot-report excerpts in the loaded slice; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.
Reviewer intent should not be generalized beyond the explicit comments; accepted lessons are limited to the evidence-backed issues of raw asm, pragmas, inline strings, and address-style data naming.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Raw asm fallbacks in normal implementation files should be reverted when C implementations exist or are expected
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2730 attempted MWERKS asm fallbacks for ifStatus_802F7134 and ifStatus_802F7220. Review requested revert, and the final cleanup restored C implementations. Use this as historical evidence against accepting raw asm as a matching shortcut for ordinary source.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep archive/resource strings inline unless ownership evidence supports symbolization
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2730, replacing the inline "ScInfCnt_scene_models" archive section name with an address-style cast was questioned, and final cleanup kept archive section names inline at lbArchive_LoadSections call sites.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Temporary pragmas need explicit cleanup-debt comments
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2730 retained a tightly scoped soundtest #pragma global_optimizer off only after review accepted it for now and requested the comment be changed to /// @todo Find a solution without the pragma.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer readable data shape over address-named wrappers when evidence supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2730 final cleanup restored readable vi1201v1 player_spawn data shape instead of an address-named wrapper that QA flagged.

source_update_candidates.title: Historical example for avoiding raw asm fallback in ordinary implementation code
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2730 provides a concrete review example: raw MWERKS asm fallbacks for ifStatus_802F7134 and ifStatus_802F7220 were explicitly reverted and replaced with C implementations.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be used as a concrete example under existing standards, not a new standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Historical example for keeping archive strings inline
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2730 review questioned replacing an inline lbArchive_LoadSections string with an address-style reference; final cleanup kept archive section names inline.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful example for existing string-literal and data-ownership standards.

rejection_notes: Do not promote camera declaration-order, pointer-temporary, volatile padding, goto, or PAD_STACK changes as global style; the loaded evidence shows local matching edits but not reviewer approval as a general tactic.
Do not infer that all pragmas are acceptable from soundtest; the evidence says this one was fine for now and had to be marked as TODO debt.
Do not infer full function-level behavior for every changed file; the raw diff is truncated and only camera plus reviewed ifstatus/soundtest hunks are directly visible.
Do not treat the PR-reported verification as independently revalidated by this intake run.
